project.name: SylphxAI Codec
project.summary: TypeScript/Bun monorepo for universal media codec, image-processing, and conversion packages, with optional WASM acceleration.
goals: Provide core media codec and conversion packages for image, video, animation, audio, metadata, drawing, filtering, transforms, compositing, and CLI usage.
Maintain pure TypeScript codec implementations with optional WASM acceleration where the repository explicitly provides it.
Track codec coverage, tests, and remaining media-format work through repo-local package code and progress documentation.
nonGoals: Own application-specific media workflows, storage products, CDN behavior, or user-facing media tools.
Own third-party codec patents, platform codec licensing, or external media-processing infrastructure.
Own enterprise engineering doctrine, standards, or project manifest schema.

owns.name: codec-package-monorepo
owns.description: The core, codecs, CLI, processing, metadata, text, and optional WASM packages under packages/.

owns.name: media-format-implementations
owns.description: Pure TypeScript media format decoders/encoders, tests, and progress tracking for supported image, video, animation, audio, and metadata formats.

doesNotOwn: Application-specific media workflows, media storage, CDN behavior, UI products, or production deployment policy.
Third-party codec patent/licensing decisions or external media-processing infrastructure.
Enterprise doctrine and manifest schema owned by SylphxAI/doctrine.

publicSurfaces.name: Processing packages
publicSurfaces.location: packages/transform, packages/color, packages/filter, packages/composite, packages/draw, packages/histogram, packages/metadata, packages/text

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema and engineering doctrine

forbiddenCouplings: Do not encode a consuming product's media workflow, storage policy, or UI behavior into codec packages.
Do not imply patent/licensing clearance for complex media formats without a repo-owned decision and validation surface.
Do not fork doctrine standards into this repository.

delivery.deployPath: Main-branch Release workflow delegates to SylphxAI/.github reusable release workflow for package publication; no pull-request CI workflow is recorded.
delivery.productionProof: Package tests, build for changed packages, codec fixture validation for affected formats, successful release workflow, and package-registry readback for published versions.

gaps.description: No pull_request or merge_group CI workflow is recorded; only the reusable main-branch release workflow exists.
gaps.target: central ADR-29 required-context rollout or repo-local package validation gate

gaps.description: The repository has PROGRESS.md but no top-level README.md explaining the package set and consumer contract.
Complex codec and WASM support can involve external licensing and published-package recovery concerns; record runbooks before production lifecycle promotion.
